description: Post-command PlayerStateSnapshot (current_room_id + visited_rooms) for the move_only scenario's bare `north`, captured from a fresh Python-direct (no gateway) live server seeded with rng_seed=1, world_time_ratio=0.0, replaying move_only.json's single command against a freshly created player starting at village_square. hash_state is the SHA-256 hex digest lorecraft.tools.replay_hash.hash_state computes over this exact snapshot (canonical_json: sorted keys, compact separators). visited_rooms starts as [village_square] (the player's spawn room is recorded as visited) and gains blacksmith_forge on the move.
